ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Funding goal for the project */,
  "pledged" TEXT /* Total amount pledged so far */,
  "percentage_funded" REAL /* Percentage of the funding goal achieved */,
  "average_donation" TEXT /* Average donation amount received */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Current outcomes status of the project (e.g., successful) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for pledges */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Funding deadline (in UNIX timestamp) */,
  "deadline_datetime" TEXT /* Deadline date and time in UTC */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Project launch date in UNIX timestamp */,
  "launched_datetime" TEXT /* Launch date and time in UTC */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is a staff pick */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Total number of backers for the project */,
  "project_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project's category */,
  "project_sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project's sub-category */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., live, draft, ended) */,
  "project_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., theater) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sub_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Specific sub-category (e.g., plays) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "total_backed" TEXT /* Total amount backed by the user across all projects */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the backer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the backer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the backer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer making the pledge */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being pledged to */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the pledge */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date when the pledge was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward selected by the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project offering the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_price" TEXT /* Price of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment is related to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_picks" (
  "staff_pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff pick */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project marked as a staff pick */,
  "highlight_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was highlighted */,
  "staff_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who highlighted the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_picks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_members" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spotlight_projects" (
  "spotlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spotlight project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is in the spotlight */,
  "spotlight_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was highlighted in the spotlight */,
  "spotlight_reason" TEXT /* Reason why the project is in the spotlight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spotlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spotlight_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate against the platform's base currency */,
  "is_base_currency" INTEGER /* Indicates if the currency is the platform's base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country (e.g., US) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the feedback pertains to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the backer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., thumbnail, banner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the video is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of the video (e.g., trailer, behind-the-scenes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)
